problem: What catalyst efficiently converts atmospheric CO2 to useful compounds at ambient conditions?
hypothesis: Combining Photocatalytic oxidation under visible light with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Life cycle assessment with 2 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
